creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 238077
patch v1

Hi!

There is a new bunch of courier packages. [1] I'd like to update the ones I maintain ports for, and to get there I also need to update sysconftool.

So I'm attaching a patch for you to approve.

I also noticed the port was creating absolute relative symlinks, I fixed that by using install(1).

Thanks in advance!


[1] https://www.courier-mta.org/download.html
